message:
refactor(mux-lua): use derive(Default) for HandySplitDirection enum

Replace manual Default impl with #[derive(Default)] and #[default]
attribute on the Right variant, following idiomatic Rust conventions
available since Rust 1.62 (clippy::derivable_impls).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
